<?php /* * This file is part of the Fidry CPUCounter Config package. * * (c) Théo FIDRY <theo.fidry@gmail.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ declare(strict_types=1); namespace Fidry\CpuCoreCounter\Finder; /** * Find the number of logical CPU cores for FreeSBD, Solaris and the likes. * * @see https://twitter.com/freebsdfrau/status/1052016199452700678?s=20&t=M2pHkRqmmna-UF68lfL2hw */ final class NProcessorFinder extends ProcOpenBasedFinder { protected function getCommand(): string { return 'getconf NPROCESSORS_ONLN'; } public function toString(): string { return 'NProcessorFinder'; } }
